summary_en: Corrected disclosure. Issuer to conduct acquisition and self-tender offer of own shares; dispose of treasury shares via third-party allotment; enter capital and business partnership with Kobe Bussan (currently holds 0.06% of Kobe Bussan; existing license and supply relationships). Specific share count, yen limit, and execution window not disclosed in excerpt.
title_en: (Corrected) Notice regarding acquisition and self-tender offer of treasury shares, disposal of treasury shares via third-party allotment, capital and business partnership with Kobe Bussan, and changes to principal shareholders and related parties
translation_en_brief: This is a corrected disclosure filed by Makiya (ticker 9890, TSE Standard) on 27 May 2026, addressing errors in an announcement made the prior day. The company is undertaking a combined capital initiative involving (1) acquisition and self-tender offer of its own shares, (2) disposal of treasury shares through third-party allotment, (3) entry into a capital and business partnership with Kobe Bussan Co., and (4) changes to principal shareholders and related parties. The excerpt provided contains only the correction notice header and a detailed profile of Kobe Bussan (capital 500M yen, ~1,674 employees, operates Gyomu Super discount supermarkets, restaurants, and renewable energy facilities). Makiya currently holds 128,000 shares (0.06%) of Kobe Bussan and has existing relationships including an area license agreement and private-label merchandise supply. The specific terms of the buyback programme—share count, yen ceiling, price limit, and execution window—are not disclosed in the pages shown.
